prompt: Delete the current slide and the next one from this Google Slides file.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Remove the currently displayed slide, slide 50, and the immediately following slide, slide 51, from the Google Slides presentation shown. The left-hand panel of slide thumbnails should update to reflect these deletions, and the main content area should display the slide that was originally numbered 52, now renumbered as 50.
objects: Top menu bar with file name and options
Slide 49 thumbnail in the left panel
Slide 50 thumbnail (previously slide 52) in the left panel, highlighted
Main content area displaying the slide "Why study Transactions in CS145?"
Slide number "50" in the bottom right corner of the main content area
